$comment: Layer C for LOCKER vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (group REDEFINES RG, docs/redefines-edited.md). Input position 0 is the member id (PIC 9(4)), position 1 the balance in cents (PIC 9(6)). WS-MONEY REDEFINES WS-REC leaf for leaf, so a read of WS-BAL-DOL resolves to WS-BAL-CENTS at a shifted scale (value * 10^(0-2)) and WS-MEM-KEY to WS-MEM-ID unshifted - each leaf a pure decimal shift, affine in its input. The 2.5% fee rounding half-boundary and the 200.00 tier boundary are both affine obligations the engine solves directly.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 LOCKER (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-locker)
